policy: Ceilings ratchet DOWN toward the 250 KB gzip First Load JS budget locked in #239, as the #270 server-prefetch PRs restructure these routes. Seeded from this check's own measurement on main plus 2% (rounded up to the next whole KB) -- never hand-copied from a baseline report. Raising a ceiling requires justification in the pull request that raises it; lowering one after a size win is encouraged.
